_source: Descriptions based on standard ASL education references (Lifeprint/ASLU by Bill Vicars, Gallaudet conventions)

a.hand_shape: A handshape: closed fist with all four fingers curled, thumb resting alongside the index finger (not over fingers)
a.location: Neutral space in front of the chest/shoulder

b.hand_shape: B handshape: all four fingers extended straight and together, thumb folded tightly across the palm
b.location: Neutral space at shoulder height, palm facing forward

c.hand_shape: C handshape: all fingers curved and held together forming a large C shape, thumb curves to match
c.location: Neutral space in front of the body

d.hand_shape: D handshape: index finger points straight up, middle, ring, and pinky fingers curve down to touch the thumb, forming a circle
d.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

e.hand_shape: E handshape: all four fingers bend at the knuckles so fingertips touch the bent thumb; hand looks like a claw pressed flat
e.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

f.hand_shape: F handshape: index finger and thumb touch at their tips forming a circle; middle, ring, and pinky fingers extend upward
f.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

g.hand_shape: G handshape: index finger points forward, thumb points forward in parallel below it (like pointing a gun sideways)
g.location: Neutral space beside the body, pointing to the side

h.hand_shape: H handshape: index and middle fingers extended together and pointing sideways, other fingers folded, thumb rests on folded fingers
h.location: Neutral space beside the body, fingers pointing to the side

i.hand_shape: I handshape: pinky finger extended straight up, all other fingers curled into fist, thumb folds over middle fingers
i.location: Neutral space in front of the shoulder

j.hand_shape: I handshape: pinky finger extended, others in fist
j.movement: Trace the letter J in the air — curve down, then hook back to the left

k.hand_shape: K handshape: index finger points up, middle finger extends forward at an angle, thumb rests between them; ring and pinky folded
k.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

l.hand_shape: L handshape: index finger points straight up, thumb extends straight out to the side forming an L shape; other fingers curled
l.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

m.hand_shape: M handshape: index, middle, and ring fingers folded down over the thumb; pinky folded in
m.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

n.hand_shape: N handshape: index and middle fingers folded down over the thumb; ring and pinky folded in
n.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

o.hand_shape: O handshape: all fingers curve down and all fingertips touch the thumb, forming a round O shape
o.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

p.hand_shape: P handshape: K handshape rotated so the middle finger points downward (index points forward, thumb between index and middle)

q.hand_shape: Q handshape: G handshape rotated downward — index and thumb point downward

r.hand_shape: R handshape: index and middle fingers extended and crossed over each other; ring and pinky folded, thumb rests on them
r.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

s.hand_shape: S handshape: closed fist with all fingers curled; thumb wraps over the index and middle fingers
s.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

t.hand_shape: T handshape: thumb is tucked between the index and middle fingers, fist closed
t.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

u.hand_shape: U handshape: index and middle fingers extended together and pointing straight up, held together (not spread); ring and pinky folded, thumb folded
u.location: Neutral space in front of the chest, palm facing forward

v.hand_shape: V handshape (also called 2 handshape): index and middle fingers extended and spread apart in a V/peace-sign shape; ring and pinky folded, thumb folded
v.location: Neutral space in front of the chest, palm facing forward

w.hand_shape: W handshape: index, middle, and ring fingers extended and spread apart; pinky and thumb touch each other
w.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

x.hand_shape: X handshape: index finger bent/hooked at the knuckle like a hook; other fingers curled in fist, thumb alongside
x.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

y.hand_shape: Y handshape: thumb and pinky extended outward; index, middle, and ring fingers folded into palm
y.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

z.location: Upper neutral space in front of the chest
z.movement: Trace the letter Z in the air — draw a line right, then diagonally down-left, then a line right again

one.hand_shape: 1 handshape: index finger points straight up, all other fingers curl into fist
one.location: Neutral space in front of the chest, palm facing signer

two.hand_shape: 2 handshape (V handshape): index and middle fingers extended and spread in a V; other fingers folded
two.location: Neutral space in front of the chest, palm facing signer

three.hand_shape: 3 handshape: thumb, index, and middle fingers extended and spread; ring and pinky folded into palm
three.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

four.hand_shape: 4 handshape: all four fingers (index through pinky) extended and spread, thumb folded across the palm
four.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

five.hand_shape: 5 handshape: all five fingers spread open, palm facing forward
five.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

six.hand_shape: 6 handshape (also called W or 'six'): pinky and thumb touch at their tips; index, middle, and ring fingers extended
six.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

seven.hand_shape: 7 handshape: ring finger bends to touch the thumb; index, middle, and pinky extended
seven.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

eight.hand_shape: 8 handshape: middle finger bends down to touch the thumb; index, ring, and pinky extended
eight.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

nine.hand_shape: 9 handshape: index finger bends to touch the thumb forming a circle; middle, ring, and pinky extended
nine.location: Neutral space in front of the chest

ten.hand_shape: A handshape (closed fist) with thumb extended upward
ten.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
ten.movement: Shake or twist the wrist slightly side-to-side

january.hand_shape: J, A, N handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
january.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
january.movement: Smoothly transition through J → A → N handshapes, moving slightly to the right

february.hand_shape: F, E, B handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
february.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
february.movement: Smoothly transition through F → E → B handshapes, moving slightly to the right

march.hand_shape: M, A, R handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
march.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
march.movement: Smoothly transition through M → A → R handshapes, moving slightly to the right

april.hand_shape: A, P, R handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
april.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
april.movement: Smoothly transition through A → P → R handshapes, moving slightly to the right

may.hand_shape: M, A, Y handshapes in sequence (fully fingerspelled — only 3 letters)
may.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
may.movement: Smoothly transition through M → A → Y handshapes

june.hand_shape: J, U, N, E handshapes in sequence (fully fingerspelled — 4 letters)
june.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
june.movement: Smoothly transition through J → U → N → E handshapes

july.hand_shape: J, U, L, Y handshapes in sequence (fully fingerspelled — 4 letters)
july.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
july.movement: Smoothly transition through J → U → L → Y handshapes

august.hand_shape: A, U, G handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
august.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
august.movement: Smoothly transition through A → U → G handshapes, moving slightly to the right

september.hand_shape: S, E, P, T handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
september.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
september.movement: Smoothly transition through S → E → P → T handshapes, moving slightly to the right

october.hand_shape: O, C, T handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
october.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
october.movement: Smoothly transition through O → C → T handshapes, moving slightly to the right

november.hand_shape: N, O, V handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
november.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
november.movement: Smoothly transition through N → O → V handshapes, moving slightly to the right

december.hand_shape: D, E, C handshapes in sequence (abbreviated fingerspelling)
december.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
december.movement: Smoothly transition through D → E → C handshapes, moving slightly to the right

angry.hand_shape: Claw-5 handshape (both hands): fingers spread and bent/curved like claws
angry.location: In front of the face, fingers pointing toward the face
angry.movement: Pull both hands outward and away from the face with tension, or claw inward toward face then pull out
angry.non_manual_markers: Furrowed brow, tense jaw, possibly bared teeth or tight lips; body may tense forward

bad.hand_shape: Flat B handshape: all fingers extended and together, thumb folded
bad.location: Fingertips touching the chin/lips at the start
bad.movement: Flick the hand outward and downward away from the mouth, rotating so fingers end pointing down
bad.non_manual_markers: Slight grimace or negative expression; mouth may turn down briefly

bathroom.hand_shape: T handshape: thumb tucked between index and middle fingers, fist closed
bathroom.location: Neutral space in front of the body
bathroom.movement: Shake the hand side-to-side (wrist twist) two or three times
bathroom.non_manual_markers: Neutral expression; sometimes a slightly raised eyebrow if asking a question

book.hand_shape: Both hands flat (B handshape), palms together like a closed book
book.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
book.movement: Open both hands outward like opening a book, keeping pinky sides together as the 'spine'

car.hand_shape: Both hands in S handshape (closed fists) or modified A handshape, representing hands gripping a steering wheel
car.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
car.movement: Move hands alternately up and down in a small steering-wheel motion, as if driving

family.hand_shape: Both hands in F handshape (index-thumb circle, other fingers extended)
family.location: Start with both F hands touching in front of the chest, index-thumb circles touching
family.movement: Circle both hands outward and forward (away from each other) until the pinky sides come together, forming a large circle representing a group

finished.hand_shape: Both hands in open-5 handshape (all fingers spread), palms facing the signer
finished.location: Chest level in front of the body
finished.movement: Quickly flip both hands outward so palms now face away from the signer
finished.non_manual_markers: Slight puff of cheeks or exhale; sometimes head tilts back slightly to emphasize completion

food.hand_shape: Flat-O handshape (dominant hand): all fingertips pinched together touching the thumb
food.movement: Tap the fingertips to the lips twice
food.non_manual_markers: Neutral expression; may show a slight hungry or interested look

friend.hand_shape: Both hands in 1 handshape (index fingers extended), then hook them together
friend.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
friend.movement: Hook the dominant index finger over the non-dominant index finger, then reverse — swap which finger is on top

good.hand_shape: Flat B handshape (dominant hand), fingers together and extended
good.movement: Move the hand forward and downward, landing on the non-dominant palm which is held flat facing up
good.non_manual_markers: Positive expression, slight smile; head may nod once

goodbye.hand_shape: Open flat hand (B handshape), palm facing forward
goodbye.movement: Bend the fingers down and back up repeatedly, as if waving goodbye
goodbye.non_manual_markers: Friendly smile; may lean head slightly

grandfather.hand_shape: Open-5 handshape (all five fingers spread), dominant hand
grandfather.location: Start with thumb touching the forehead (like FATHER sign)
grandfather.movement: Move the hand forward in two arcing bounces away from the forehead

grandmother.hand_shape: Open-5 handshape (all five fingers spread), dominant hand
grandmother.location: Start with thumb touching the chin (like MOTHER sign)
grandmother.movement: Move the hand forward in two arcing bounces away from the chin

happy.hand_shape: Open flat hand (B handshape) or open-5 handshape, palm facing the body
happy.movement: Brush the hand upward on the chest in circular motion, one or two times (like something welling up with joy)
happy.non_manual_markers: Genuine smile, bright eyes, possibly slight head nod

hello.hand_shape: Flat B handshape (all fingers together and extended), palm facing outward
hello.location: Start with fingertips at the temple or forehead
hello.movement: Extend the hand outward and slightly forward away from the forehead, like a relaxed salute

home.hand_shape: Flat-O handshape (fingertips pinched together), dominant hand
home.location: Touch fingertips to the cheek near the mouth, then move up to touch near the cheekbone/ear area
home.movement: Touch cheek once near mouth (EAT location), then touch again higher near the cheekbone (SLEEP location)
home.non_manual_markers: Neutral expression (HOME combines EAT and SLEEP — a place you eat and sleep)

hospital.hand_shape: H handshape (index and middle fingers extended together sideways) on dominant hand
hospital.location: On the upper arm/shoulder of the non-dominant arm
hospital.movement: Draw a small cross (plus sign) on the upper arm with the fingertips

house.hand_shape: Both hands flat (B handshape), angled diagonally with fingertips meeting
house.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
house.movement: Start with fingertips meeting overhead (forming a roof peak), then move hands outward and downward along the sides (forming walls), stopping at waist level

how.hand_shape: Both hands in bent/curved handshape (fingers bent, knuckles up), backs of hands facing each other
how.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
how.movement: Rotate both hands forward simultaneously so the palms end up facing upward
how.non_manual_markers: Raised eyebrows (yes/no question context) or furrowed brow (wh-question context)

hungry.hand_shape: C handshape (curved hand forming a C), dominant hand
hungry.movement: Move the C handshape downward along the chest/sternum
hungry.non_manual_markers: Can show a hungry expression — slight frown or longing look

later.hand_shape: L handshape (index up, thumb out) on dominant hand; non-dominant hand flat (palm up)
later.location: Dominant L-hand rests its thumb on the non-dominant palm
later.movement: Tilt or rotate the L-hand forward from upright to angled (like a clock hand moving forward in time)

learn.hand_shape: Dominant hand starts as open-5 (fingers spread) near the forehead, non-dominant hand flat (palm up) as a reference
learn.movement: Bring the fingertips of the dominant open hand down to the non-dominant palm, picking up 'information', then move back to forehead closing into a flat-O shape

morning.hand_shape: Non-dominant arm rests horizontally in front of body (like a horizon); dominant hand is flat (B handshape) with fingers together
morning.location: Dominant hand starts below the non-dominant arm (like the sun below the horizon)
morning.movement: Raise the dominant hand upward from below the crook of the non-dominant arm, like the sun rising

mother.hand_shape: Open-5 handshape (all five fingers spread), dominant hand
mother.movement: Tap the thumb to the chin twice

need.hand_shape: X handshape (index finger hooked/bent), dominant hand
need.location: Neutral space in front of the body
need.movement: Bend the wrist downward once or twice, like a hooking or compelling motion
need.non_manual_markers: Can show a slightly serious or urgent expression to convey necessity

now.hand_shape: Both hands in Y handshape (thumb and pinky extended) or bent-B handshape
now.non_manual_markers: Can have a slightly emphatic expression if stressing immediacy

phone.hand_shape: Y handshape (thumb and pinky extended, other fingers folded), mimicking a telephone handset
phone.location: Held up to the ear, thumb near the ear, pinky near the mouth
phone.movement: Hold the handshape at the ear; may tap slightly or just hold in place

please.hand_shape: Flat B handshape (open hand, fingers together), palm facing the chest
please.movement: Rub the hand in a circular motion on the chest (clockwise from signer's perspective)
please.non_manual_markers: Polite, slightly earnest expression; may include slight eyebrow raise

read.hand_shape: Dominant hand in V handshape (index and middle fingers spread like two eyes/legs); non-dominant hand held flat (palm up, representing a page)
read.location: Dominant V-hand over the non-dominant flat hand
read.movement: Move the V-hand (representing eyes reading) downward across the non-dominant palm, like eyes scanning a page

sad.hand_shape: Both hands open-5 (fingers spread), palms facing the signer
sad.location: In front of the face, fingers pointing upward near the cheeks
sad.movement: Move both hands slowly downward in front of the face, as if sadness is weighing the face down
sad.non_manual_markers: Downturned mouth, drooping eyelids, overall drooping facial expression

scared.hand_shape: Both hands in A or S handshape (closed fists), held on each side of the chest
scared.location: On each side of the chest
scared.movement: Quickly bring both hands toward each other and the center of the chest simultaneously, in a startled motion
scared.non_manual_markers: Wide eyes, open mouth, sharp inhale; body may flinch backward

school.hand_shape: Non-dominant hand flat (palm up); dominant hand flat (palm down)
school.location: Non-dominant flat hand held in neutral space
school.movement: Clap the dominant flat hand down onto the non-dominant palm twice

sit.hand_shape: Both hands in H handshape (index and middle fingers extended together, pointing forward)
sit.location: Neutral space in front of the body
sit.movement: Place the dominant H-fingers on top of the non-dominant H-fingers (like legs sitting on a ledge), letting them rest there

sleep.hand_shape: Open-5 handshape (fingers spread), palm facing the face
sleep.movement: Draw the hand downward over the face while the fingers come together into a flat-O shape, as if the face is closing into sleep
sleep.non_manual_markers: Eyes close as hand moves down; relaxed, sleepy expression

sorry.movement: Rub the fist in a circular motion on the chest (clockwise from signer's perspective)
sorry.non_manual_markers: Apologetic expression — furrowed brow, downturned mouth, possibly slight bow of head

stand.hand_shape: Dominant hand in V handshape (index and middle fingers extended, spread); non-dominant hand flat (palm up)
stand.location: Non-dominant palm held flat; V-fingers placed on it
stand.movement: Place the tips of the V-fingers on the non-dominant palm to stand upright, like two legs standing on a surface

thank_you.hand_shape: Flat B handshape (open hand, fingers together), dominant hand
thank_you.location: Fingertips touch the chin/lips at the start
thank_you.movement: Move the hand forward and outward away from the mouth toward the person you are thanking

thirsty.hand_shape: 1 handshape (index finger extended and pointing up), dominant hand
thirsty.movement: Drag the extended index finger slowly down the throat from chin to sternum
thirsty.non_manual_markers: Can show a thirsty or longing expression; slightly dry or craving look

tired.hand_shape: Both hands in bent-5 handshape (fingers bent, fingertips on chest), fingertips touching the chest on each side
tired.location: On the chest, one hand on each side
tired.movement: Rotate both hands forward and downward simultaneously, so fingers end up pointing down — like energy draining away
tired.non_manual_markers: Drooping eyelids, slightly slumped shoulders, tired expression

today.hand_shape: Y handshapes (both hands, thumb and pinky extended) or bent hands
today.movement: Drop both hands downward firmly (sign NOW), repeat once more (sign DAY) — or sign NOW then DAY sequentially

tomorrow.hand_shape: A handshape with thumb extended (thumbs-up style), dominant hand
tomorrow.location: Thumb side of fist touching the cheek
tomorrow.movement: Move the hand forward (away from the face, toward the future)

wait.hand_shape: Both hands in open curved/bent-5 handshape, fingers spread and bent
wait.location: One hand slightly in front of the other, both at waist/torso level
wait.movement: Wiggle all the fingers of both hands (like a slow wave of fingers)
wait.non_manual_markers: Neutral or slightly patient expression; sometimes lips pressed together

want.hand_shape: Both hands in curved-5 handshape (fingers spread and bent, palms facing up)
want.location: Neutral space in front of the body, palms up
want.movement: Pull both hands toward the body (drawing in what you want)
want.non_manual_markers: Can show a wanting or desirous expression; eyebrows may lower slightly

water.hand_shape: W handshape (index, middle, ring fingers extended and spread), dominant hand
water.movement: Tap the W-handshape fingertips to the chin twice

when.hand_shape: Both hands in 1 handshape (index fingers extended); dominant index circles the non-dominant index, then touches its tip
when.location: Neutral space in front of the body
when.movement: Dominant index finger circles around the tip of the non-dominant index finger, then touches the tip
when.non_manual_markers: Raised eyebrows (if yes/no question); furrowed brow (if wh-question)

where.hand_shape: 1 handshape (index finger extended, pointing up), dominant hand
where.location: Neutral space in front of the body
where.movement: Shake the index finger side-to-side (back and forth) at the wrist

which.hand_shape: Both hands in A handshape (closed fists) or Y handshape
which.location: Neutral space in front of the body, one hand slightly higher
which.movement: Move both hands alternately up and down, like a scale/balance tipping back and forth
which.non_manual_markers: Furrowed brow; slight tilt of head (wh-question marker)

who.hand_shape: L handshape or bent-1 handshape (index finger slightly bent) near the mouth, or dominant hand with index at lips
who.movement: Circle or wiggle the index finger in front of the lips

why.hand_shape: Open hand at forehead then Y handshape: touch forehead with middle finger of open hand, then move hand outward closing into Y handshape
why.movement: Touch the middle finger to the forehead, then draw the hand forward and down while transitioning to Y handshape

write.hand_shape: Dominant hand in a modified F or pinching handshape (index finger and thumb pinched together, other fingers loosely extended, mimicking holding a pen)
write.location: Dominant hand above the non-dominant flat palm (palm up, held horizontally)
write.movement: Move the dominant hand across the non-dominant palm in a writing motion, like writing on paper
write.non_manual_markers: Neutral expression; sometimes a focused look

yes.hand_shape: S handshape (closed fist, thumb over fingers), dominant hand
yes.location: Neutral space in front of the chest
yes.movement: Nod the hand up and down at the wrist (like the fist is nodding), one or two times
yes.non_manual_markers: Affirmative nod of the head; positive expression

yesterday.hand_shape: A handshape with thumb extended (thumbs-up), dominant hand
yesterday.location: Thumb side of fist touching the cheek
yesterday.movement: Move the hand backward (toward the back of the head, toward the past)
